scale_invariance_verdict: VARIANT_B_D_STILL_SCALE_INVARIANT_AT_MEASURED_GRID: sidecar bytes spread 0.0% across gain_clamp ∈ [0.05, 0.1, 0.2]. The sign-bitmap entropy does NOT meaningfully depend on gain_clamp at this fixture/training/converged regime. Per Catalog #307 sister: IMPLEMENTATION-LEVEL FALSIFICATION of Variant B-d codec design — the PARADIGM (residual-correction hybrid stacking) is INTACT. DEFER to Variant C (training-side fix preventing tanh saturation) per CLAUDE.md 'Forbidden premature KILL'. Variant B-d HAS moved the absolute sidecar bytes UP from L1 ~42B to ~149B (sign-bitmap encoding scales with NUM_PIXELS), but the gain_clamp-axis scale-invariance persists.
